ddls:
CREATE TABLE "proposals" (
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proposal */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research proposal */,
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submitter */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the proposal was submitted */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the proposal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the proposal (e.g., submitted, evaluated, funded) */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the proposal */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords relevant to the proposal */,
  "funding_required" TEXT /* Amount of funding required for the proposal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proposal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposals_submitter_id FOREIGN KEY ("submitter_id") REFERENCES submitters ("submitter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submitters" (
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submitter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the submitter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the submitter */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the submitter belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the submitter within the institution */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the submitter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submitter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criterion */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation criterion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criterion */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the criterion in the overall evaluation */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., qualitative, quantitative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality level */,
  "score_range" TEXT /* Range of scores associated with the quality level */,
  "evaluation_guidelines" TEXT /* Guidelines for evaluating the quality level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the proposal being evaluated */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the criterion being evaluated */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned to the proposal for the criterion */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or feedback from the evaluator */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES criteria ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_proposal_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposal_id") REFERENCES proposals ("proposal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluators" (
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the evaluator */,
  "field_of_expertise" TEXT /* Field of expertise of the evaluator */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the evaluator */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proposal_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proposal version */,
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the proposal */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the proposal */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the version was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the proposal version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made in the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposal_versions_proposal_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposal_id") REFERENCES proposals ("proposal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation report */,
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the proposal */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of the proposal across all criteria */,
  "strengths" TEXT /* Summary of the proposal's strengths */,
  "areas_for_improvement" TEXT /* Summary of areas for improvement */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation for funding or further evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_reports_proposal_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposal_id") REFERENCES proposals ("proposal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluator_proposal_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the proposal */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., assigned, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluator_proposal_assignments_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluator_proposal_assignments_proposal_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposal_id") REFERENCES proposals ("proposal_id")
)
